description.value:
A weaker Latin translation of Dzyan's work, created approximately 250 years after the Greek version. The translation mistakenly seeks to introduce a narrative element to Dzyan's work and thereby dilutes it. A few copies of this version are known to exist.

LanguageLatin
AuthorAemilianus Cethegus
Date23 B.C.
Sanity Loss1D6
Cthulhu Mythos+3/+6 percentiles
Mythos Rating27
Study (weeks)14

Spells Contained

  • Rouse The Forest Shepherd (Summon/Bind Dark Young)
  • Breath Of The Black Wind (Summon/Bind Byakhee)
  • Call The Hidden Horror (Summon/Bind Dimensional Shambler)
  • The Dreaming (Contact Deity/Cthulhu)

system.author: Aemilianus Cethegus
system.spells: Rouse The Forest Shepherd (Summon/Bind Dark Young), Breath Of The Black Wind (Summon/Bind Byakhee), Call The Hidden Horror (Summon/Bind Dimensional Shambler), The Dreaming (Contact Deity/Cthulhu)
